post.summary: Creates a new uninitialized brand and returns its public ID.

delete.summary:
Deletes the existing active brand (soft delete)
Set another existing brand as new active brand.

get.summary: Retrieves a brand by its public ID.
Returns the UUID of the first and only uninitialized brand for the current user.

put.summary: Initializes an existing brand and set it as ActiveBrand.
Restores a brand that is on soft delete state.

delete.summary: Deletes all brands associated with the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Returns all media content lists for the user’s active brand.

post.summary: Creates a new media content list and returns its public ID.

put.summary: Updates an existing media content list’s metadata by public ID.

delete.summary: Deletes a media content list by public ID (system lists are protected at service level).

put.summary: Persists a new ordering of media content lists based on the provided ordered public ID list.

get.summary: Retrieves a single media content item by its public ID.

put.summary: Updates info and properties of an existing media content item.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a media content item by its public ID.

get.summary: Retrieves paginated media content items, scoped either by list or by brand with per-list limits.

post.summary: Creates a new media content upload plan and returns the generated public ID.

put.summary: Toggles the favorite status of a media content item.
Moves a media content item to another content list using the target list public ID.

get.summary: Simple health check endpoint to verify the API is online.

Retrieves a list of connected social accounts for the active brand.
Optional query param 'platform' to filter by specific platform (e.g. 'tiktok').

schema.description: A list of dictionaries where the key is the string representation of Platform (e.g., "TIKTOK").
A list of dictionaries where the key is the string representation of Platform (e.g., "TIKTOK").
A list of dictionaries where the key is the string representation of Platform (e.g., "TIKTOK").

get.summary:
Generates an OAuth authorization URL for the requested platform and initiates the connection flow.
Support the inclusion of a query param 'Guid? uninitializedBrandUuid'.

delete.summary:
Disconnects the current user from the specified external platform.
Support the inclusion of a query param 'Guid? uninitializedBrandUuid'.

get.summary: Handles the OAuth callback from an external platform and completes the connection process.
Retrieves a single calendar item using its public calendar item ID (base64-encoded).

delete.summary: Deletes schedules or specific occurrences based on the CalendarItemId and deleteOccurrenceOnly flag.

get.summary: Retrieves all calendar items for the active brand, optionally filtered by a date range in local time.

post.summary: Creates a new schedule (one-time or recurring) and returns its public ID.

put.summary: Partially updates an existing schedule using a set of updated properties.

get.summary: Generates a pre-signed upload URL for a media content item using its public ID.

post.summary: Completes an upload process by attaching a thumbnail to the media content item identified by its public ID.
Aborts an in-progress upload for a media content item identified by its public ID.

get.summary: Generates a temporary download URL for a media content item using its public ID.

Retrieves a vision plan by its public ID.
Supports fetching a specific version index (1-based).

post.summary:
Saves a vision plan into the SQL database.
(Called by the Studio Core worker).
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Generates a structured vision plan via Vision Creator.
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Updates an existing Vision plan using an LLM based on a prompt.
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Executes a vision plan to generate a video and uploads the result.

Retrieves a public audio URL for a social media link.
(Awaits Studio API processing).

put.summary:
Links a media content item to a vision plan record.
(Called by the Studio Core worker).

get.summary: Retrieves a atlas plan by its public UUID.

post.summary:
Saves a atlas plan into the SQL database.
(Called by the Studio Core worker).
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Generates a structured atlas plan via Atlas Creator.
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Updates resources for a specific scene index in a atlas plan.
CREATOR ENDPOINT - Executes a Atlas video generation and uploads the result.

put.summary:
Links a media content item to a atlas plan record.
(Called by the Studio Core worker).

post.summary: Saves asset generation logs to the database.

get.summary: Retrieves the currently authenticated user profile.

post.summary: Creates a new user profile for the authenticated Firebase user.

put.summary: Updates the profile information of the currently authenticated user.

delete.summary: Deletes the currently authenticated user profile.

post.summary: Sets the active brand for the currently authenticated user using the brand public ID.

thumbnailObject.description:
Thumbnail bytes (Swagger sends this as base64).
Hard-limited to 1MB by design.

plannedAt.description:
The planned start date/time (Local time of the brand).
Note: Do not append 'Z' to the end of the string unless you are explicitly passing UTC time. 
An unspecified time will be correctly interpreted as the Brand's local time.

rrule.description: Recurrence rule of the policy (e.g. RRULE:FREQ=DAILY).

endTime.description: Optional end date/time of the policy (Local time of the brand).

plannedAt.description:
The planned start date/time (Local time of the brand).
Note: Do not append 'Z' to the end of the string unless you are explicitly passing UTC time. 
An unspecified time will be correctly interpreted as the Brand's local time.
